description: Style Note woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylish overlays on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Product Details Khaki coloured upper with strategically placed overlays, central lace ups, padded tongue, padded insole for in-step comfort, brand logo at the heel, dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heel, outsole reinforced onto the upper on the toe box and heel collar for maximum comfort, outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard Material and Care Nubuk, TPU Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
